case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BAKER, SHAWN D.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.26 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, SHAWN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKER, SHAWN D. $150.56 PRINCIPAL, $25.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $176.43, DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CORRECTED TO: SHAWN BAKER.
